instruction:
The polynomial function f(x)=-2212x^2+57,575x+107,896 models the cumulative number of deaths from AIDS in the United States, $f(x)$, where $x$ is the number of years after 1990.
a) Find $f(10)$=[ANS]
b) In what year is the cumulative number of AIDS deaths in the United States equal to your answer in part a)? Answer: [ANS]
